body.text: VA prosecutor refusals broaden the hardware-ban storyline; ATF gender-ID rule gets on-record Leider clarification

At least 4 Virginia Commonwealth's Attorneys (Spotsylvania, Smyth, Powhatan, Pulaski) publicly refuse to enforce new bans, citing Heller + Bruen. ATF Chief Counsel Leider on-record: gender-ID rule is not a backdoor trans gun ban; NPRM has drawn the most comments in the 32-rule package.

facts.title: 2. ATF gender-ID rule — Leider on-record interview
3. Christian v. James 2nd Cir. — reference status, Reload newsletter recap

body.text:
• VA: 4 Commonwealth's Attorneys (Spotsylvania, Smyth, Powhatan, Pulaski) refuse to enforce new bans
• ATF: Leider on-record — gender-ID rule is not a trans gun ban; majority of comments critical
• Polls: 3 May polls (Quinnipiac, YouGov, Echelon) show guns at 1–2% of voter top issues
• VA litigation: four-suit landscape day 8; effective date July 1 unchanged
